mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals tight labor market conditions that support corporate profit growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE remains below 4.5%

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and stable inflation (CPIAUCSL < 2.5%) indicates robust real economic activity without monetary tightening, creating positive equity return momentum over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.05 when testing INDPRO/CPIAUCSL co-movement in 3-year rolling windows

mechanism_narrative: A 20-day forward decline in the federal funds rate signals imminent monetary easing, reducing discount rates and boosting equity valuations despite short-term volatility.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative after 3 consecutive FEDFUNDS rate cuts

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth above 2% (GDPC1) indicates strong macroeconomic momentum that sustains positive equity returns over the following 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns fall below 0% in 40%+ of quarters with GDPC1 growth > 2%

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts (HOUST > 1300k) signals strong consumer confidence and demand-side expansion, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in > 50% of HOUST > 1300 instances

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS > 150k) indicates sustained employment expansion that supports consumer spending and equity earnings, producing positive 5-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in > 40% of PAYEMS > 150k reports

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in consumer spending (RSAFS > 470k) and housing starts (HOUST > 1250) indicates broad demand expansion, creating positive equity return momentum over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.03 for RSAFS/HOUST co-movement in 2-year windows

mechanism_narrative: A 20-day decline in industrial production (INDPRO < 104) signals weakening supply-side activity that reduces corporate earnings expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative after 3 consecutive INDPRO declines > 1.5%
